news.title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
news.summary: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

news.title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
news.summary: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

news.title: Nuclear startup X-energy raises $1B in data center-driven IPO
news.summary: Amazon-backed X-energy was able to raise around 20% more money in its IPO as demand for nuclear power surges.

news.title: Another spyware maker caught distributing fake Android snooping apps
news.summary: Researchers have found a new case where government authorities used a fake Android app to plant spyware on a target’s phone. The company that allegedly developed the spyware was not previously known to sell this type of software.

news.title: BMW is one step closer to selling you a color-changing car
news.summary: At CES 2022, BMW debuted its BMW iX Flow concept car that could dynamically change its appearance using the same grayscale E Ink panels found in e-readers like the Kindle. news.title: How Project Maven taught the military to love AI
news.summary: In the first 24 hours of the assault on Iran, the US military struck more than 1,000 targets, nearly double the scale of the "shock and awe" attack on Iraq over two decades ago.
